input.initialPrompt: Analyze code coverage and risk hotspots for this project. I haven't run any coverage yet.

data.reasoningText:
The user wants me to analyze code coverage and risk hotspots for this .NET project. They haven't run any coverage yet, so I need to:

1. First explore the project structure to understand what we're working with
2. Set up and run code coverage
3. Analyze the results

Let me start by exploring the project structure.

data.content: Good — `coverlet.collector` is already referenced. Let me run tests with coverage collection and then analyze the results.
data.reasoningText: Now I have a good understanding of the project. Let me run the tests with code coverage using coverlet (which is already referenced in the test project). I'll use Cobertura format and then parse the results.

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-ee0a235030184b818392891d2785330b && dotnet test --collect:\"XPlat Code Coverage\" --results-directory ./coverage-results -- DataCollectionRunSettings.DataCollectors.DataCollector.Configuration.Format=cobertura 2>&1", "description": "Run tests with code coverage", "initial_wait": 60}
